scripts.dev:local: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev:local:api" "npm run dev:local:web"
scripts.dev:local:alt: concurrently -k -n api,web "CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3002 PORT=4002 npm run dev -w apps/api" "PORT=3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4002/api npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.local:setup: cp -n apps/api/.env.example apps/api/.env || true && cp -n apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env || true && npm run prisma:migrate -w apps/api && npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api
scripts.docker:smoke: docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile . && docker build -f apps/api/Dockerfile . && docker build -f workers/Dockerfile .
